title: Bed Bug Treatment in Castle Hill, Bronx | $1,200–$3,500 | Best Pest Control NYC

intro: Castle Hill residents deserve a pest-free home, and Best Pest Control NYC delivers fast, effective bed bug treatment tailored to your property. Whether you live in a single-family home near Pugsley Creek Park or a multi-unit building along Westchester Avenue, our licensed technicians use proven heat and chemical treatments to eliminate bed bugs completely. We proudly serve all of Castle Hill with transparent pricing from $1,200 to $3,500.

We offer same-day and next-day service, use family-safe treatments, and back our work with a satisfaction guarantee so you can rest easy knowing your home is protected.
localContext: Castle Hill's mix of pre-war apartment buildings, co-ops near Castle Hill Avenue, and residential homes creates diverse pest control needs that require local expertise. From the busy commercial corridor of Westchester Avenue to the quieter streets near Unionport, our team knows the neighborhood and responds quickly to bed bug emergencies throughout 10473.

faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Castle Hill?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Castle Hill typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method. Single-room treatments start at $1,200, while whole-home heat treatments for larger properties can reach $3,500. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide bed bug treatment in Castle Hill?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day bed bug treatment service throughout Castle Hill and the Bronx. We understand the urgency of bed bug infestations and prioritize rapid response. Call us before noon and we can often schedule a technician the same day to inspect your property and begin treatment.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use?
faqs.answer: We use a combination of heat treatment and EPA-approved chemical solutions for maximum effectiveness. Heat treatment raises room temperature to levels that kill bed bugs and their eggs instantly, while targeted chemical applications provide long-term protection. Our technicians will recommend the best approach based on your specific infestation and property type.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Castle Hill home during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we raise temperatures to effective levels. For chemical treatments, we recommend staying out for 4-6 hours until products dry completely. We'll provide detailed preparation instructions before your appointment, and our treatments are safe for children and pets once the space is cleared for re-entry.
